gene_region.label: APC transcribed interval
gene_region.definition: Canonical APC genomic interval on GRCh37 / hg19 from Ensembl GRCh37 lookup, aligned to the hg19 coordinate system used by this app.

promoter_review_region.label: Operational promoter review window
promoter_review_region.definition: A practical 1 kb upstream window used by this app to flag promoter-adjacent coverage before the canonical gene interval begins.

promoter_hotspot_region.label: Promoter-associated CpG review window
promoter_hotspot_region.definition: Promoter-proximal CpG-focused span represented by the bundled EPIC subset and used here as the main methylation-review hotspot.

gene_context.gene_summary: APC encodes APC, a tumor-suppressor scaffold in the beta-catenin destruction complex. This bundle emphasizes Wnt/beta-catenin restraint, cell adhesion, chromosome segregation, intestinal stem-cell control, and colorectal tumor biology.
gene_context.clinical_context: The local APC bundle is Wnt pathway tumor-suppressor review oriented. Interpret markers through exact allele class, zygosity, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context rather than as stand-alone deterministic calls.
variant_effect_overview: APC variants can alter or tag Wnt/beta-catenin restraint, cell adhesion, chromosome segregation, intestinal stem-cell control, and colorectal tumor biology; effect direction depends on allele class, tissue, dosage, and biological context.
Common markers, pharmacogenetic alleles, structural events, and high-impact pathogenic variants should be kept separate during interpretation.
gene_context.methylation_interpretation: APC methylation should be treated as local regulatory context around a Wnt/beta-catenin restraint, cell adhesion, chromosome segregation, intestinal stem-cell control, and colorectal tumor biology gene. Promoter-proximal methylation can support expression-potential review, but it should not replace genotype, RNA, protein, or phenotype data.
methylation_effects: Promoter or first-exon methylation may suggest a more restrained or permissive local expression state for APC.
Because APC biology is tissue and pathway dependent, methylation values are context rather than a stand-alone biomarker.

Combined sequence plus methylation findings are most useful when interpreted against Wnt/beta-catenin restraint, cell adhesion, chromosome segregation, intestinal stem-cell control, and colorectal tumor biology.
methylation_condition_research: Epigenetic regulation studies that use APC promoter or gene-body methylation as expression-context evidence.
Variant-plus-methylation review for Wnt/beta-catenin restraint, cell adhesion, chromosome segregation, intestinal stem-cell control, and colorectal tumor biology.

evidence.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000134982: APC coordinate source

biorender_visuals.label: APC biochemical figure starter
biorender_visuals.focus: APC: Wnt/beta-catenin restraint, cell adhesion, chromosome segregation, intestinal stem-cell control, and colorectal tumor biology
biorender_visuals.template_title: Intracellular Layout - Receptor Signaling from Plasma Membrane to Nucleus (2)
biorender_visuals.usage_note: BioRender template and icon-library search results are bundled as figure starters. Open the template link in BioRender, then add or replace the listed icons to make a gene-specific biochemical pathway image.

gene_context.concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a APC Wnt pathway tumor-suppressor review thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to Wnt/beta-catenin restraint, cell adhesion, chromosome segregation, intestinal stem-cell control, and colorectal tumor biology and Familial adenomatous polyposis review context, Colorectal tumor-suppressor biology. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support.

variant_records.clinical_interpretation: APC truncating-variant model is curated as a APC marker for Familial adenomatous polyposis review context, Colorectal tumor-suppressor biology. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the Wnt/beta-catenin restraint, cell adhesion, chromosome segregation, intestinal stem-cell control, and colorectal tumor biology pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_records.clinical_significance: Curated research and clinical-context marker; external clinical classification is required for diagnostic use.
functional_effects: Can modify or tag Wnt/beta-catenin restraint, cell adhesion, chromosome segregation, intestinal stem-cell control, and colorectal tumor biology.
Best interpreted with tissue, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context.
research_context: Use this marker as a APC pathway-context signal, not as a stand-alone diagnosis.
Sequence, methylation, expression, and protein data may point in different directions and should be reconciled.
variant_records.methylation_interpretation: Pair APC truncating-variant model with APC methylation only as local regulatory context; methylation does not prove the variant's biochemical effect.

literature_findings.genotypes: APC truncating-variant model or linked APC locus genotype states
literature_findings.phenotype: Familial adenomatous polyposis review context, Colorectal tumor-suppressor biology
literature_findings.finding: The local curation treats APC truncating-variant model as a gene-specific marker for Familial adenomatous polyposis review context, Colorectal tumor-suppressor biology and Wnt/beta-catenin restraint, cell adhesion, chromosome segregation, intestinal stem-cell control, and colorectal tumor biology.

variant_records.clinical_parameter_summary: This record describes a recurrent model, haplotype, fusion, or loss-of-function class rather than a simple SNP row.
